projectBuilt.description: Project built (pnpm build creates dist/ folder)

apiKey.description: AI Model API key in .env file (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

setupGuide.instruction: Please refer to the above document to configure the API Key of the AI model. Prepare the complete the.env file content or the path of the existing the.env file. Claude Code will copy it to the plugin directory

setupInstructions: 2. Run: pnpm build (build TypeScript to dist/ folder)
4. Edit .env and add your AI model credentials following: https://midscenejs.com/model-config.html
5. Ensure Google Chrome is installed on your system
6. Test installation: node dist/src/cli.js navigate https://example.com
7. Update this setup.json file: set all 'installed'/'configured' to true and 'setupComplete' to true
verifySetup: Run 'node dist/src/cli.js navigate https://example.com' to verify installation
